session_changes_2026_06_23_dsh004_dsh005: DSH-004: Full-stack Cart & Serviceability — migration, Go backend (cart.go), HTTP handlers (http/cart.go), 5 routes in server.go, 7 OpenAPI schemas + 5 paths, shared brain (cart.types.ts, cart.api.ts, use-cart-controller.tsx), CartScreen (app-client), CartActivityScreen (control-panel, DataTable from ui-kit)

DSH-005: Full-stack Checkout Intent & WLT Handoff — migration (dsh_checkout_intents table), Go backend (checkout.go), HTTP handlers (http/checkout.go, actor.ID fix), 4 routes in server.go, 4 real OpenAPI operations + 4 schemas, WLT callback remains CONTRACT_DRAFT, shared brain (checkout.types.ts, checkout.api.ts, use-checkout-controller.tsx), CheckoutScreen (app-client, 8 states), CheckoutActivityScreen (control-panel, DataTable), updated catalog-contract.test.mjs (3/3 PASS)
session_changes_2026_06_24_dsh006: DSH-006: Full-stack Order Fulfillment & Partner Acceptance — migration dsh-006_orders.sql (dsh_orders+dsh_order_items+dsh_order_status_events+6 indexes, store_id TEXT FK, checkout_intent_id UUID FK), Go domain orders.go (CreateOrder tx, GetOrder, GetClientOrder, ListClientOrders, ListPartnerOrders, ListOperatorOrders, AcceptOrder, RejectOrder, MarkPreparing, MarkReadyForPickup with state-machine transitions + audit events), 9 HTTP handlers orders.go (client: create/list/get, partner: list/accept/reject/preparing/ready, operator: list), 9 routes in server.go, OpenAPI 9 operations + 7 schemas, shared brain now split into orders.states.ts, orders.view-model.ts, orders.controller-core.ts, orders.api.ts, use-orders-controller.ts, and index.ts. OrdersListScreen uses current @bthwani/ui-kit props. services/dsh tests 140/140 PASS. Go build/test PASS. TypeScript PASS. Runtime healthy. Status remains FIX_REQUIRED until visual and remote evidence are attached.
session_changes_2026_06_24_dsh007: DSH-007: Dispatch & Captain Delivery Lifecycle — migration dsh-007_dispatch.sql (dsh_assignments+dsh_deliveries and extended order status constraints), Go domain dispatch.go, HTTP handlers dispatch.go, 8 routes in server.go, OpenAPI DshDispatch operations/schemas, generated dsh-api client regenerated, explicit services/dsh/clients/dispatch-client.ts, shared frontend brain under services/dsh/frontend/shared/dispatch, app-captain DshCaptainOrdersScreen, app-client OrderTrackingScreen, and control-panel DispatchAssignmentScreen. Runtime API smoke PASS on local DSH API 58081 with runtime Postgres/Identity: operator assignment, captain accept/status transitions, client tracking, PoD delivered. Status remains FIX_REQUIRED until visual/manual evidence and DSH-006 dependency closure are complete.
